## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing services to LiveKit's lead marketing executive.](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [LiveKit seeks to establish thought leadership in the voice/video AI space, focusing on technical content, educational resources, and thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven content creation workflows, optimizing for both SEO and AI search visibility, with daily publishing and end-to-end content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [LiveKit is interested but not actively seeking content partners; they're currently scaling their small marketing team and defining content needs](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

## Topics

### LiveKit's Current Marketing Situation

  - [4-month-old marketing team led by Jenny (ex-MongoDB)](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Team composition: Jenny + 1 developer advocate](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Seeking to hire: product marketing, more developer advocates, growth marketing, field marketing, marketing ops](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Main goal: Grow awareness in voice/video AI space](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Content focus areas:](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
    1.  Technical content (demos, examples)
    2.  Educational content (foundational, not product-specific)
    3.  Thought leadership

### LiveKit's Product and Market Position

  - [Platform for building voice and video AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Offers networking infrastructure layer used by some competitors](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Notable customers: Sort Health (healthcare scheduling), Purple Fish (AI recruiting)](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Competitors: Vappy, Daily, Petcat, Retail, Eleven Labs, Decagon, Sierra](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [AI-powered content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Optimizes for both SEO and AI search (GEO)](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Daily publishing model](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [End-to-end partner: strategy to publishing and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint + 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Custom AI workflows built in code](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Team includes managing director, editor, content manager](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Provides reporting (alternative to tools like Ahrefs, Semrush)](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Develops rich artifacts (personas, company context, writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows for brief generation, research, drafting, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Human experts in the loop for quality control and customization](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Can handle technical and thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

### Potential Partnership

  - [Could eliminate need for additional hires at LiveKit](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [GrowthX handles editorial, freeing LiveKit team for technical content](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Weekly meetings initially, transitioning to async review as needed](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Next steps: Reconnect week of October 6th after potential new hires](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send follow-up email with presentation and example links](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Jenny to review materials with team and new hires (if applicable)](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [Scheduled follow-up call for October 8th (same time)](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [Jenny to provide more context on LiveKit's content needs and team structure in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/SPLyrqz-Cv2WgvnP_EBB8ZGehCRFq1wc?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
